prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年山东省综合类最低录取位次分别为约1040名、1035名、1119名、1752名、1593名。2021–2023年位次稳定在1000–1100名区间，2024年骤降至1752名（ 后移约633名），2025年回升至1593名（前移约159名），近两年波动幅度较大，2025年基准位次约1593名；该校在山东省综合类招生计划2021–2025年连续五年 均为25人，2026年计划缩减至21人，较2025年减少4人（缩招16%）。缩招意味着供给减少，在其他条件不变时有利于位次前移（竞争加剧），但需结合考生规 模等综合判断。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 复旦大学（含上海医学院）为985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校；2026年软科中国大学主榜排名第5位（Top5），属全国顶尖高校层次，对高 分考生有持续强吸引力；2026年声誉评价为偏负面（主要涉及师德师风与学校管理类舆情），但抖音综合热度排名第4（高热），短视频平台曝光度极高，报考 关注度持续升温；2025年声誉评价为偏正面（科研成果类正面信号）；2022–2023年曾出现投档线异常相关关注。综合来看，声誉信号中性偏弱，但高热度曝光对报考竞争有正向 推动作用；复旦大学（含上海医学院）第五轮学科评估中，临床医学A、公共卫生与预防医学A+、护理学A-、药学A、生物学A+等医学相关学科实力顶尖，与该校 在山东招生的临床医学（八年制/五年制）、口腔医学、医学试验班（含预防医学、药学）等专业高度匹配，对医学方向考生有极强吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 临床医学202 4年专业热度评估为推荐（偏热），2023年为高热推荐，持续处于高热状态；口腔医学2024年为推荐（偏热）；医学类专业整体报考热度居高不下。山东省2026年高考报名总人数 约72万人（较2025年68.1万增加约3.9万，增幅约5.7%），考生规模持续扩大，竞争进一步加剧。；复旦大学上海医学院位于上海市，属一线城市优质高校，对山东省考生有较强的跨省吸引力；该校在山东招生计划占比较小（约21–25人），属于典 型的外省顶尖院校少量招生模式，位次易受当年报考情绪波动影响。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次1593名、2026年计划缩招16%、山东 省考生总数增长约5.7%加剧竞争、医学类专业热度持续高热、学校抖音高热度曝光等因素，预计2026年录取位次较。预测最低录取位次约1500名，位次区间1320–1 680名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 临床医学（八年制临床医师班/正谊明道班）
- 临床医学（卓越临床医师班/五年制）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 口腔医学（卓越口腔医师班）
- 医学试验班（拔尖班）（预防医学五年制拔尖班、药学拔尖班）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 医学试验班（公共事业管理、药学、预防医学五年制）。
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间1320–1680名内，建议以二档专业为主力报考方向（临床医学五年制、口腔医学），一档专业（八年制临床医学）作为冲刺目标，三档专业（医学试验班综合方向 ）作为稳妥保底。位次明显优于区间上限（1320名以内）可重点冲刺一档王牌专业。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for comprehensive subjects in Shandong Province were approximately 1040, 1035, 1119, 1752, and 1593 respectively. Rankings were stable in the 1000–1100 range from 2021 to 2023, dropped sharply to 1752 in 2024 (a backward shift of about 633 places), and rebounded to 1593 in 2025 (a forward shift of about 159 places). The fluctuations in the past two years have been significant, with the baseline ranking for 2025 being approximately 1593. The university's enrollment plan for comprehensive subjects in Shandong Province remained at 25 students for five consecutive years from 2021 to 2025, but will be reduced to 21 students in 2026, a decrease of 4 students (a 16% reduction) compared to 2025. A reduction in enrollment means a decrease in supply, which, under unchanged conditions, favors a forward shift in rankings (increased competition), but this must be considered alongside factors such as the total number of examinees.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Fudan University (including Shanghai Medical College) is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class construction university. In the 2026 Soft Science China University Main Ranking, it ranks 5th (Top 5), placing it among the top-tier universities nationwide, which exerts a sustained strong attraction for high-scoring students. In 2026, its reputation evaluation is slightly negative (mainly involving public opinion on teacher ethics and school management), but its Douyin comprehensive popularity ranks 4th (high heat), with extremely high exposure on short video platforms, leading to continuously rising application attention. In 2025, its reputation evaluation was slightly positive (positive signals from scientific research achievements). From 2022 to 2023, there was abnormal attention related to admission cutoffs. Overall, the reputation signal is neutral to weak, but high-heat exposure positively drives application competition. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Fudan University (including Shanghai Medical College) achieved top-tier results in medical-related disciplines: Clinical Medicine A, Public Health and Preventive Medicine A+, Nursing A-, Pharmacy A, and Biology A+. These disciplines are highly matched with the majors it recruits in Shandong, such as Clinical Medicine (eight-year/five-year), Stomatology, and Medical Experimental Class (including Preventive Medicine, Pharmacy), exerting a very strong attraction for students interested in medicine.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: In 2024, the popularity evaluation of Clinical Medicine was recommended (slightly hot), and in 2023 it was highly recommended (very hot), remaining in a high-heat state. In 2024, Stomatology was also recommended (slightly hot). The overall application heat for medical majors remains high. In 2026, the total number of Gaokao registrants in Shandong Province is approximately 720,000 (an increase of about 39,000 from 681,000 in 2025, an increase of about 5.7%), with the examinee pool continuing to expand, further intensifying competition. Fudan University Shanghai Medical College is located in Shanghai, a first-tier city with high-quality universities, exerting a strong cross-provincial attraction for Shandong students. The university's enrollment plan in Shandong is relatively small (about 21–25 students), representing a typical model of limited enrollment by top-tier universities from other provinces, making rankings susceptible to fluctuations in application sentiment in a given year.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 1593, the 2026 enrollment reduction of 16%, the approximately 5.7% increase in Shandong's examinee population intensifying competition, the persistently high heat of medical majors, and the high Douyin exposure of the university, the predicted admission ranking for 2026 is expected to shift forward. The predicted minimum admission ranking is approximately 1500, with a ranking range of 1320–1680.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult)
- Clinical Medicine (Eight-Year Clinical Physician Class/Zhengyi Mingdao Class)
- Clinical Medicine (Outstanding Clinical Physician Class/Five-Year Program)
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Stomatology (Outstanding Stomatologist Class)
- Medical Experimental Class (Top-Notch Class) (Preventive Medicine Five-Year Top-Notch Class, Pharmacy Top-Notch Class)
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easier)
- Medical Experimental Class (Public Administration, Pharmacy, Preventive Medicine Five-Year Program)
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 1320–1680, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors (Clinical Medicine Five-Year Program, Stomatology) as the primary application direction, with Tier 1 majors (Eight-Year Clinical Medicine) as a reach goal, and Tier 3 majors (Medical Experimental Class Comprehensive Direction) as a safe backup. For rankings significantly better than the upper limit of the range (within 1320), it is advisable to focus on reaching for Tier 1 flagship majors.
